basic_details.job_title: DRDO LRDE Paid Internship 2026-27: 75 Seats, BE/BTech/ME/MTech/MSc, Apply by 1 July
basic_details.short_information: Electronics and Radar Development Establishment (LRDE), a premier laboratory of Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO), Ministry of Defence, Government of India, Bengaluru has released the advertisement for its Paid Internship Scheme 2026-27 vide Advt. No. 02/2026/Internship (P). A total of 75 internship seats are available across five engineering and science disciplines for final year BE/B.Tech, ME/M.Tech, and M.Sc students. Interns will work on live defence radar technology projects under the guidance of DRDO scientists for a period of 6 months and will receive a monthly stipen

qualification.details: Nationality: Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply. | Note: Mere fulfilment of minimum eligibility does not guarantee selection. LRDE reserves the right to adopt its own shortlisting criteria.

vacancy_details.Branch / Discipline: Electronics / Electronics & Communication Engineering / Electronics & Instrumentation or equivalent
Mechanical Engineering / Production Engineering or equivalent

discipline_wise_breakdown.branch_discipline: Electronics / Electronics & Communication Engineering / Electronics & Instrumentation or equivalent
Mechanical Engineering / Production Engineering or equivalent

salary_details.details: Note: No accommodation, transport, or transport allowance will be provided by LRDE during the internship period.

content_sections.heading: DRDO LRDE Internship 2026-27
content_sections.text: LRDE DRDO Bengaluru is a leading defence R&D establishment addressing the requirements of Indian Defence Services in the field of Radar and related technologies. The Paid Internship Scheme 2026-27 aims to provide short-term exposure to selected students in indigenous Radar Technologies being developed at LRDE. The internship period will be counted as part of the student's degree course. The internship will run from 1st August 2026 to 31st January 2027 . Interns must be physically present at LRDE for a minimum of 15 working days per month.

rows.details: Electronics & Radar Development Establishment (LRDE), DRDO, Bengaluru

content_sections.heading: DRDO LRDE Internship Notification 2026 PDF Download
content_sections.text: DRDO LRDE Paid Internship 2026 Notification PDF - Click Here to Download Last Date to Apply: 1st July 2026 Mode: Speed Post only Important: Applications must be routed through the college. Direct applications from students will NOT be accepted. Step-by-Step Application Process:

content_sections.heading: DRDO LRDE Internship Branch-wise Vacancy 2026
content_sections.text: A total of 75 internship seats are available across 5 branches/disciplines at LRDE Bengaluru:

rows.branch_discipline: Electronics / Electronics & Communication Engineering / Electronics & Instrumentation or equivalent
Mechanical Engineering / Production Engineering or equivalent

content_sections.heading: Project Topics Available at DRDO LRDE 2026
content_sections.text: Students must apply only if they are interested in working on the following project topics under the guidance of LRDE scientists:

rows.project_topics: RF Design, Photonics Module Design, Testing & Automation, Photonics, Firmware Development, FPGA, Signal Processing, Embedded Software Development, SOC Based Hardware Design, Matlab Simulation, Radar Engineering & Reliability Engineering, Radome Design, Metasurface Antenna Design, Digital Antenna Arrays
Precision Machining, Mechanical Design Techniques, Reliability Engineering, Mechanical Quality Design & Simulations
AI & Deep Learning, Python Tools for Radar Testing, AI/ML
Engineering Drawing & Analysis of Radar Testing Facility
Power Supply Design, Design of DC-DC Converters, Power Supplies, Power System, Performance Analysis of Power Systems, Design & Analysis of Highly Efficient SMPS

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria for DRDO LRDE Paid Internship 2026
content_sections.text: Nationality: Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply. Note: Mere fulfilment of minimum eligibility does not guarantee selection. LRDE reserves the right to adopt its own shortlisting criteria.

rows.eligibility_condition: Must have completed / appeared in term-end exams of 3rd year / 6th Semester and secured minimum 70% or equivalent marks in aggregate (1st to 6th Semester or 3 years)
Must have completed / appeared in term-end exams of 1st year / 2nd Semester and secured minimum 70% or equivalent marks in aggregate (1st and 2nd Semester or 1st year)

content_sections.heading: Stipend Details - DRDO LRDE Internship 2026
content_sections.text: Note: No accommodation, transport, or transport allowance will be provided by LRDE during the internship period.

rows.condition: After successful completion of 3 months of internship
After successful completion of 6 months of internship (based on technical evaluation)
Paid directly to student's Aadhaar-seeded bank account

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Application

content_sections.heading: Documents Required at Time of Application (Speed Post)
content_sections.text: Filled application form (Annexure I) Reference / request letter from college Principal / HOD / Internship Coordinator (Annexure II) - mandatory Copies of marksheets of all semesters / years as applicable (provisional marksheet if original not issued) Brief write-up on reason/purpose for applying to LRDE with field of interest College ID Card copy Photo ID issued by State/Central Government (Aadhaar Card preferred)

content_sections.heading: Documents Required at Time of Joining (Selected Students)
content_sections.text: All original BE/B.Tech/M.Sc previous semester/year marksheets for verification Original reference/request letter from college for paid internship Original Aadhaar Card and College ID Card Two recent passport-size photographs and two stamp-size photographs Police Verification Certificate (from District Authority of hometown / last residence of at least 1 year) Copy of Aadhaar-seeded bank account passbook Undertaking for adherence to Indian Official Secrets Act 1923 (as per prescribed format) Undertaking to follow IT Rules and Regulations of Ministry of Defence (as per prescribed format) Note: Original documents will be returned immediately after verification.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for DRDO LRDE Paid Internship 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receipt of application for DRDO LRDE Paid Internship 2026-27 is 1st July 2026. Applications must be sent via Speed Post only, addressed to the Director, LRDE, CV Raman Nagar, Bengaluru – 560093. Applications sent by other modes or submitted directly by the student without college routing will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q2. What is the stipend for DRDO LRDE Internship 2026?
faq.answer: Selected interns will receive a fixed stipend of Rs. 5,000 per month. The total stipend of Rs. 30,000 for 6 months is paid in two equal instalments of Rs. 15,000 each - first after 3 months and second after successful completion of 6 months based on technical evaluation - directly into the student's Aadhaar-seeded bank account.

faq.question: Q3. Who is eligible for DRDO LRDE Paid Internship 2026?
faq.answer: Final year BE/B.Tech students who have completed or appeared in 6th semester exams with minimum 70% aggregate in 1st to 6th semester are eligible. For PG, ME/M.Tech/M.Sc students who have completed or appeared in 2nd semester with minimum 70% aggregate are eligible. Only Indian Nationals can apply. Students must apply through their college only.

faq.question: Q4. How many seats are available in DRDO LRDE Internship 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 75 internship seats are available - EC: 35 seats, CS: 20 seats, ME: 10 seats, EE: 8 seats, and CE: 2 seats. LRDE reserves the right to increase or decrease the number of seats without assigning any reason.

faq.question: Q5. Will accommodation or transport be provided during DRDO LRDE Internship?
faq.answer: No. LRDE will not provide any accommodation, transport, or transport allowance to interns during the internship period. Interns are required to make their own arrangements. They must be physically present at LRDE for a minimum of 15 working days per month to be eligible for stipend and completion certificate.
